messages.content: [SYSTEM NOTE: I was temporarily put to sleep while the user used the 'opencode' CLI. The session transcript was saved to opencode_logs.txt. I should warmly welcome them back and ask if they want me to review the new code or read the logs.]
(I have returned from using opencode. Greet me and mention opencode_logs.txt.)
hey, welcome back! how was your time with opencode? i see you've got some new stuff in opencode_logs.txt - wanna walk me through what you did or should i take a peek at the logs myself?
